channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-20 05:13 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: When one brain isn't enough, switch to Grok 4.20. Four independent agents analyze your question, deb...
item.description: When one brain isn't enough, switch to Grok 4.20. Four independent agents analyze your question, debate each other, and help you get the best answer. Available now to SuperGrok and Premium+ subscribers globally.

item.title: @elonmusk: He who makes half a revolution digs his own grave
item.description: He who makes half a revolution digs his own grave

item.title: @elonmusk: I love Grok Imagine!! You have to try this.grok.com/imagine
item.description: I love Grok Imagine!! You have to try this.grok.com/imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: 30 seconds of Grok Imagine with two characters: 1- Create your characters 2- Animate them, using bot...
item.description: 30 seconds of Grok Imagine with two characters: 1- Create your characters 2- Animate them, using both characters as image references

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine has a lot of cool Templates Try them...Have fun creating together with your friends and...
item.description: Grok Imagine has a lot of cool Templates Try them...Have fun creating together with your friends and family

item.title: @elonmusk: We – design the chips & hardware – make the cars w/ said hardware – collect real-world data at scale...
item.description: We – design the chips & hardware – make the cars w/ said hardware – collect real-world data at scale – train the real-world AI model – built (& continue to expand) the massive supercomputer cluster that trains it – deploy AI directly to millions of robots on wheels All that is shared with@Tesla_Optimusfor broader applications in both the physical & digital world

item.title: @elonmusk: Major update to the 𝕏 AI recommendation algorithm rolling out next week. This will be open sourced a...
item.description: Major update to the 𝕏 AI recommendation algorithm rolling out next week. This will be open sourced at the same time.

item.title: @elonmusk: New Template: Cyber Garage Upload your photo and turn your home into a cyberpunk research site. Try ...
item.description: New Template: Cyber Garage Upload your photo and turn your home into a cyberpunk research site. Try it and share the result with me ↓

item.title: @elonmusk: BEV sales in Spain. Tesla is in first place. 🇪🇸
item.description: BEV sales in Spain. Tesla is in first place. 🇪🇸

item.description: This has been going on for a long time

item.title: @elonmusk: We don’t live in a democracy if our elected leaders fail to implement the will of the people
